expList.description:
• Leadership: Acted as the primary technical point of contact for stakeholders, gathering feedback to drive a full
webpage revamp that significantly improved user engagement.
• Teamwork: Collaborated closely with a multi-person development team to review design changes and ensure
seamless application of new features.
• Technical Execution: Integrated backend processes using Apps Script to manage organizational information
effectively.

• Project Ownership: Managed the end-to-end development lifecycle, serving as the sole client-facing represen
tative from initial consultation to deployment.

retention and value.
• UI Development: Led a complete front-end revamp using HTML, CSS, and JS, currently transitioning to React
to further optimize performance.
